sd1.evidence: Before any code, you must write a specification

sd2.evidence: All of these are saved to disk and reviewed.

lw2.evidence: The process runs in ordered phases with gates between them.

tf1.evidence: Testing is enforced test-first: write a failing test, then code to make it

tf2.evidence: Red-green is mandatory and coverage gates the merge.

ma1.evidence: Work is split across many specialist subagents that orchestrate and delegate
